Kql: datatable(k:long, v:long)[ 1,10, 1,20, 2,30, 2,30 ] | extend nv=iif(k==2, long(null), v) | summarize s=sum(nv), av=avg(nv), mn=min(nv), mx=max(nv), c=count(), cv=count(nv), anyv=take_any(nv), sd=stdev(nv) by k | order by k asc
Sql: SELECT * FROM (SELECT k, COALESCE(SUM(nv), 0) AS s, COALESCE(AVG(nv), 'nan'::DOUBLE) AS av, MIN(nv) AS mn, MAX(nv) AS mx, COUNT(*) AS c, COUNT(*) AS cv, ANY_VALUE(nv) AS anyv, STDDEV_SAMP(nv) AS sd FROM (SELECT *, CASE WHEN k = 2 THEN CAST(NULL AS BIGINT) ELSE v END AS nv FROM (VALUES (CAST(1 AS BIGINT), CAST(10 AS BIGINT)), (CAST(1 AS BIGINT), CAST(20 AS BIGINT)), (CAST(2 AS BIGINT), CAST(30 AS BIGINT)), (CAST(2 AS BIGINT), CAST(30 AS BIGINT))) AS t(k, v)) GROUP BY ALL) ORDER BY k ASC NULLS FIRST

Kql: datatable(g:string, x:long)[ "a",1, "a",long(null), "b",long(null), "b",long(null) ] | summarize s=sum(x), av=avg(x), c=count(), cx=count(x), mn=min(x), mx=max(x), arr=make_list(x), arrif=make_list_if(x, isnotnull(x)) by g | order by g asc
Sql: SELECT * FROM (SELECT g, COALESCE(SUM(x), 0) AS s, COALESCE(AVG(x), 'nan'::DOUBLE) AS av, COUNT(*) AS c, COUNT(*) AS cx, MIN(x) AS mn, MAX(x) AS mx, COALESCE(LIST(x) FILTER (WHERE x IS NOT NULL), []) AS arr, COALESCE(LIST(x) FILTER (WHERE ((x IS NOT NULL)) AND x IS NOT NULL), []) AS arrif FROM (VALUES ('a', CAST(1 AS BIGINT)), ('a', CAST(CAST(NULL AS BIGINT) AS BIGINT)), ('b', CAST(CAST(NULL AS BIGINT) AS BIGINT)), ('b', CAST(CAST(NULL AS BIGINT) AS BIGINT))) AS t(g, x) GROUP BY ALL) ORDER BY g ASC NULLS FIRST

Kql: datatable(x:int)[ ] | union (datatable(x:int)[ ]) | summarize c=count()
Sql: SELECT COUNT(*) AS c FROM ((SELECT NULL AS x WHERE 1 = 0) UNION ALL BY NAME (SELECT NULL AS x WHERE 1 = 0))

Kql: datatable(x:int)[ 1,2,3 ] | where false | top 5 by x asc | project x
Sql: SELECT x FROM (VALUES (1), (2), (3)) AS t(x) WHERE FALSE ORDER BY x ASC LIMIT 5

Kql: datatable(x:int)[ 1,2,3 ] | where x > 100 | summarize mn=min(x), mx=max(x), s=sum(x), av=avg(x), c=count() by bin(x, 10)
Sql: SELECT FLOOR((x)/(10))*(10) AS x, MIN(x) AS mn, MAX(x) AS mx, COALESCE(SUM(x), 0) AS s, COALESCE(AVG(x), 'nan'::DOUBLE) AS av, COUNT(*) AS c FROM (SELECT * FROM (VALUES (1), (2), (3)) AS t(x) WHERE x > 100) GROUP BY ALL

Kql: datatable(x:long)[ 1, 2, 3 ] | extend y=iif(x==2, long(null), x) | summarize dc=dcount(y), arr=make_set(y), sl=make_list(y) | project arr_has_null=array_length(arr), sl
Sql: SELECT LEN(arr) AS arr_has_null, sl FROM (SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT y) AS dc, COALESCE(LIST(DISTINCT y) FILTER (WHERE y IS NOT NULL), []) AS arr, COALESCE(LIST(y) FILTER (WHERE y IS NOT NULL), []) AS sl FROM (SELECT *, CASE WHEN x = 2 THEN CAST(NULL AS BIGINT) ELSE x END AS y FROM (VALUES (CAST(1 AS BIGINT)), (CAST(2 AS BIGINT)), (CAST(3 AS BIGINT))) AS t(x)))

Kql: datatable(s:string)[ "abc", "", "x" ] | extend sub1=substring(s, 2, 10), sub2=substring(s, -2, 5), idx=indexof(s, ""), rep=replace_string(s, "", "_") | project s, sub1, sub2, idx, rep
Sql: SELECT s, sub1, sub2, idx, rep FROM (SELECT *, SUBSTR(CAST(s AS VARCHAR), (2) + 1, 10) AS sub1, SUBSTR(CAST(s AS VARCHAR), ((-2)) + 1, 5) AS sub2, (INSTR(CAST(s AS VARCHAR), '') - 1) AS idx, REPLACE(s, '', '_') AS rep FROM (VALUES ('abc'), (''), ('x')) AS t(s))
Detail: first differing row[0]: kusto=('abc', 'c', 'bc', null, 'abc') duck=('abc', 'c', 'c', 0, 'abc')

Kql: print a=strcat_array(dynamic([1,null,3]), "-"), b=split("a,,b", ","), c=split("", ","), d=array_length(split("", ",")), e=strcat_array(dynamic([]), ",")
Sql: SELECT ARRAY_TO_STRING(LIST_VALUE(1, NULL, 3), '-') AS a, STRING_SPLIT(CAST('a,,b' AS VARCHAR), ',') AS b, STRING_SPLIT(CAST('' AS VARCHAR), ',') AS c, LEN(STRING_SPLIT(CAST('' AS VARCHAR), ',')) AS d, ARRAY_TO_STRING(LIST_VALUE(), ',') AS e

Kql: datatable(x:int)[ 1, 2, 3 ] | extend big=strrep("ab", 50) | extend sl=strlen(big), sub=substring(big, 95, 20) | summarize mx=max(sl), s=take_any(sub)
Sql: SELECT MAX(sl) AS mx, ANY_VALUE(sub) AS s FROM (SELECT *, LENGTH(CAST(big AS VARCHAR)) AS sl, SUBSTR(CAST(big AS VARCHAR), (95) + 1, 20) AS sub FROM (SELECT *, REPEAT('ab', 50) AS big FROM (VALUES (1), (2), (3)) AS t(x)))

Kql: datatable(x:long)[ 5, 3, 8, long(null), 1, long(null) ] | top 3 by x desc nulls first | project x
Sql: SELECT x FROM (VALUES (CAST(5 AS BIGINT)), (CAST(3 AS BIGINT)), (CAST(8 AS BIGINT)), (CAST(CAST(NULL AS BIGINT) AS BIGINT)), (CAST(1 AS BIGINT)), (CAST(CAST(NULL AS BIGINT) AS BIGINT))) AS t(x) ORDER BY x DESC NULLS FIRST LIMIT 3

Kql: datatable(x:long)[ 5, 3, 8, long(null), 1 ] | sort by x desc | extend rn=row_number() | project rn, x
Sql: SELECT rn, x FROM (SELECT *, ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY x DESC NULLS LAST) AS rn FROM (VALUES (CAST(5 AS BIGINT)), (CAST(3 AS BIGINT)), (CAST(8 AS BIGINT)), (CAST(CAST(NULL AS BIGINT) AS BIGINT)), (CAST(1 AS BIGINT))) AS t(x) ORDER BY x DESC NULLS LAST)

Kql: datatable(g:string, x:long)[ "a",3, "a",long(null), "a",1, "b",long(null) ] | sort by g asc, x asc nulls last | extend rn=row_number(), rng=row_number(1, g != prev(g)) | project g, x, rn
Sql: SELECT g, x, rn FROM (SELECT *, ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY g ASC NULLS FIRST, x DESC NULLS LAST) AS rn, ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY g ASC NULLS FIRST, x DESC NULLS LAST) AS rng FROM (VALUES ('a', CAST(3 AS BIGINT)), ('a', CAST(CAST(NULL AS BIGINT) AS BIGINT)), ('a', CAST(1 AS BIGINT)), ('b', CAST(CAST(NULL AS BIGINT) AS BIGINT))) AS t(g, x) ORDER BY g ASC NULLS FIRST, x DESC NULLS LAST)
Detail: first differing row[0]: kusto=('a', 1, 1) duck=('a', 3, 1)

Kql: range x from 1 to 5 step 1 | extend y=iif(x % 2 == 0, long(null), x) | make-series s=sum(y) default=long(null) on x from 1 to 6 step 1
Sql: SELECT LIST(COALESCE(s_val, CAST(NULL AS BIGINT)) ORDER BY _ts) AS s, LIST(_axis._ts ORDER BY _axis._ts) AS x FROM (SELECT (1) + _i*(1) AS _ts FROM range(0, CAST(CEIL(((6) - (1))/(1)) AS BIGINT)) AS _r(_i)) AS _axis LEFT JOIN (SELECT ((1) + FLOOR(((x) - (1))/(1))*(1)) AS _bucket, CAST(COALESCE(SUM(y), 0) AS DOUBLE) AS s_val FROM (SELECT *, CASE WHEN x % 2 = 0 THEN CAST(NULL AS BIGINT) ELSE x END AS y FROM (SELECT generate_series AS x FROM generate_series(CAST(1 AS BIGINT), CAST(5 AS BIGINT), CAST(1 AS BIGINT)))) GROUP BY _bucket) AS _data ON _axis._ts = _data._bucket

Kql: datatable(k:long, v:long)[ 1,10, 1,long(null), 2,long(null) ] | summarize m=make_bag(pack(tostring(k), v)) | project m
Sql: SELECT m FROM (SELECT histogram(json_object(TRY_CAST(k AS TEXT), v)) AS m FROM (VALUES (CAST(1 AS BIGINT), CAST(10 AS BIGINT)), (CAST(1 AS BIGINT), CAST(CAST(NULL AS BIGINT) AS BIGINT)), (CAST(2 AS BIGINT), CAST(CAST(NULL AS BIGINT) AS BIGINT))) AS t(k, v))
